nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 10am and noon, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 2pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 63 in the afternoon. Northeast wind 5 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
